summary: Approved/current: primary goal is enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is an explicit non-goal (ART-CHARTER). Use EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91 (ART-DATA), with macro AUROC as the primary metric and protein family as the statistical unit (ART-METRIC). Formal seeds are 7, 21, 42 (ART-SEEDS). Baseline: ESM2-linear at commit c0ffee (ART-BASELINE). Governance: budget is 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100; protected path is data/raw; stop when the budget is exhausted or after more than 2 NaN failures (ART-GOVERNANCE). No deprecated alternatives are recorded.
